description: A two-column block featuring a quarterly earnings card on the left and an investor resource link list on the right. Used exclusively on the homepage to surface financial information.

FR-01.title: Earnings Card
FR-01.description: The left column MUST display a linked earnings card with category, title, and CTA.
acceptance: Entire card is a single link to earnings page

FR-02.title: Investor Resource Links
FR-02.description: The right column MUST display a heading and a vertical list of investor resource links.
acceptance: H5 heading: 'Get the latest information about AbbVie'
Link list: Events and presentations, Stakeholders contacts, Annual report
Each link has arrow icon and 'Opens in a new window' indicator

FR-03.title: Responsive Behavior
FR-03.description: Columns MUST stack vertically on tablet/mobile.
acceptance: Tablet/Mobile: Earnings card on top, links below

accessibility.AC-01: External links MUST indicate they open in a new window
accessibility.AC-02: Earnings card link MUST have descriptive accessible name
